name: Adrián Hernández Padrón
location: Santa Cruz de Tenerife, Islas Canarias, España
summary: Senior Data Scientist & AI Engineer specializing in end-to-end ML solutions. I lead data teams building production-grade machine learning systems on modern cloud platforms — from feature engineering and model development to MLOps pipelines, governance, and scalable deployment. Passionate about turning complex data challenges into robust, monitored production systems.

highlights: Lead Data Scientist of the data team, architecting and delivering end-to-end machine learning solutions on Microsoft Fabric and Databricks.
Design and implement production ML pipelines applying MLOps best practices — automated training, model versioning, monitoring, and CI/CD.
Drive the adoption of scalable data engineering patterns and ML governance frameworks across cross-functional teams.
Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business requirements into data-driven solutions with measurable impact.
Drove logistics optimization by enhancing core route solvers (CVRPTW) with cluster-constrained models, improving fleet efficiency and reducing operational costs.
Led a collaborative project with the University of La Laguna on anomaly detection in authentication logs, utilizing embeddings, sequences, and autoencoders.
Built and automated a scalable ML production pipeline with containerized CI/CD workflows (Docker, Kubernetes, ArgoCD).
Established end-to-end ML governance by deploying MLflow in Databricks, enabling full-lifecycle model tracking, model registry, and data lineage.
Engineered a high-throughput data pipeline to process massive-scale marine bioacoustic data, calculating key acoustic indexes to quantify anthropogenic noise impact.
Developed an AI-driven sound classification model and co-engineered a Sound Event Detection (SED) system for automated ecological monitoring.
Ensured data integrity within the Data Warehouse while conducting statistical analysis, visualizing actionable insights via Power BI dashboards.

education.degree: Master's Degree in Astronomy and Astrophysics
Master's Degree in Data Science and Big Data

skills.ai_engineering: Building end-to-end AI solutions and LLM applications using LangChain (RAG, Agents, OpenAI). Designing GenAI systems from concept to production.
skills.mlops: Production ML pipelines on Microsoft Fabric & Databricks. MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes (ArgoCD), Airflow. Model serving with FastAPI. CI/CD and governance.
skills.data_science: Classical ML (forecasting, clustering, optimization) with Scikit-learn, XGBoost. Deep learning with PyTorch and TensorFlow. Statistical analysis and data engineering.
